source: Live web — giving trends & sector news (seeded snapshot)

items.headline: Online year-end giving concentrated in final 3 days of December
items.detail: Sector benchmarks show roughly a third of December online revenue arrives Dec 29-31; mobile-optimized, single-click asks convert best.

items.headline: Tax-deduction deadline of December 31 drives major-gift timing
items.detail: Donors itemizing deductions must complete gifts by Dec 31; securities and DAF gifts need extra lead time to clear before the deadline.

items.headline: Corporate matching-gift programs reset annually
items.detail: Many employer match programs expire at calendar year-end; reminding donors to submit match requests can double a gift's impact.

items.headline: Giving Tuesday momentum carries into December appeals
items.detail: Donors who gave on Giving Tuesday show elevated response to a follow-up year-end ask within 3-4 weeks.
